title: THAT
description: A 1.21.1 Kitchen-sink, SMP-esque modpack, with low requirements. Something for everyone!
body:
![What is THAT?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/918a6e0077753aa77d62722988641a454f127ab3_0.webp)

THAT stands for Totally wHolesome and Terrific!

A reinvention of the PhoenixTech: Reloaded modpack found on Curseforge, brought to Modrinth! An action packed adventure/tech/magic pack that will be sure to keep you busy. Explore a vast terrain and beat many bosses, or start a farm and live the life. Designed with multiplayer in mind, but singleplayer is fully capable.

This pack, being a more SMP style, is set up for communities to play on. Currently, we have Vic's Point Blank (a gun mod) for ranged weaponry, Cobblemon for casual battles and compentition, Farmer's Delight for the more agriculturally inclined, and Create for the technically inclined. For Create and Farmer's Delight, we've done some work to integrate into into other mods and to expand their content. 

We would love to include MineColonies (the original pack had it, but MineColonies isn't published on Modrinth), Mekanism and/or EnderIO, Tinker's Construct, among other mods, but the time hasn't come quite yet for those.

Well optimized! RAM recommendation is 8 GB

![Planned Features:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/498cb6085aa96babfc2837bd37a3e2eb0ed4cb52_0.webp)

- Removing Herobrine
- Adding Valkrien Skies
- Adding Destroy
- Adding Quests
- Customizing Menues
- Better optimization

![Known Issues](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2991740fd7bba07bc752b4db983de0805e544c81_0.webp)

For some users, especially Mac users, distant horizons seems to dislike loading worlds when rendering is on. This is an issue with sodium. You can turn off rendering, join the world, then re-enable rendering and all should work fine.
